_comment: Seccomp profile for the agent-orchestrator devcontainer. Purpose: let bubblewrap create unprivileged user/mount namespaces for Codex and Pi without granting SYS_ADMIN or using seccomp=unconfined. Strategy: allow by default, then ERRNO-deny host-dangerous syscall families (kernel module load/unload, kexec, reboot, clock changes, raw I/O ports, swap, perf/bpf, and related legacy interfaces). Namespace setup calls including unshare, clone, clone3, setns, mount, umount2, pivot_root, and keyctl remain allowed. This is intentionally more permissive than Docker's deny-by-default profile; use it only with the dedicated agent-orchestrator-bwrap AppArmor profile and the controls documented in .devcontainer/BUBBLEWRAP.md.
